title: n2c2 2022: Social Determinants of Health Extraction
description: Extract social determinants of health (SDOH) from clinical notes. Annotators identify SDOH entities (Employment, Housing, Substance Use, etc.) and their attributes (status, type, temporal information). Based on the n2c2 2022 Track 2 shared task for SDOH extraction from clinical narratives.
